message:
feat(dashboard): add pane_delegate.go foundation for bubbles/list

Create paneItem and paneDelegate types for bubbles/list integration:
- paneItem implements list.Item (Title, Description, FilterValue)
- paneDelegate implements list.ItemDelegate (Height, Spacing, Update, Render)
- Delegate's Render() uses existing RenderPaneRow for visual consistency
- Helper functions for pane item conversion and ID-based lookup

Foundation for br-a6cs7 Phase 2d - full integration pending

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
